meaning: n.水池草(泛指多种淡水植物,如眼子菜,鸭子草等)
examples: The fishes are there, there among the pondweed.
Horned pondweed: completely submerged herbs; in some classifications included in potamogetonaceae.
In the 14 years since the first genetically modified crops were planted commercially, their descendants, relatives and remixes have gone forth and multiplied like profitable, high-tech pondweed.
Funded by Natural England, the Broads Authority hopes stonewort, pondweed and lilies will return to the area, along with a more diverse selection of fish and birds including the booming bittern.
